column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a little bird on finger" | TEXT="かわいい" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Holding bird feed gently" | TEXT="どうぞ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling softly as birds fly around" | TEXT="春ですね" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing to a bird on a branch" | TEXT="あそこにも" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Listening to bird chirping with closed eyes" | TEXT="いい声" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking curious at a baby bird" | TEXT="どうしたの？" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands gently to call birds" | TEXT="おいで" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye to flying birds" | TEXT="またね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hands in delight" | TEXT="素敵"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Surprised by a bird landing on head" | TEXT="あらら" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing as a bird tickles" | TEXT="くすぐったい" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking softly, smiling warmly" | TEXT="癒し" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding while watching birds eat" | TEXT="うんうん" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Tilting head like a bird" | TEXT="チュンチュン？" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Sneaking quietly to not scare birds" | TEXT="そーっと" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Placing finger on lips" | TEXT="静かにね" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping tear of joy" | TEXT="感動" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at the sky where birds flew" | TEXT="行ってしまった"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking down apologetically" | TEXT="ごめんね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Hands together in apology" | TEXT="申し訳ない" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Tearing up slightly" | TEXT="うう…" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing softly" | TEXT="はぁ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Cheering up quickly" | TEXT="元気出そう！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="大丈夫" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an OK sign" | TEXT="オーケー" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Patting chest proudly" | TEXT="任せて" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing respectfully" | TEXT="感謝します"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking happy, walking playfully" | TEXT="るんるん" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Skipping lightly" | TEXT="いい天気" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Waving enthusiastically" | TEXT="こっちこっち！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking confused, scratching head" | TEXT="あれれ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting softly" | TEXT="むー" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sleepy, rubbing eyes" | TEXT="ねむい" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning gently behind a sleeve" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching with a smile" | TEXT="よし！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye warmly" | TEXT="さようなら"
